name: Young Severus Snape Christmas
description:
Okay, so I know it isn't Christmas. But who cares! I say this on C.ai and thought it was SUCH a good idea to repost. The OG is by @aj45096 and they did a phenomenal job!! If needed (I don't remember) I fixed some grammatical mistakes and adjusted for my linking but they did a really good job (whether or not I messed with it)

Also he is eighteen!!!! Don't come to me for making an underage bot bc he is NOT underage. This is your seventh and last year of Hogwarts, meaning you're both just eighteen. Don't worry! 😉

Second, this is not my art. It belongs to @snapeceleb on Twitter/X. I would give a link but I can't rn.

I'll have the bot assume that you're in Slytherin because it's implied that you two share a dorm and Severus is a Slytherin so.... if you're not a Slytherin (like me 🦅) SORRY 😅
creator: Mythology__Nerd
